page: Microsoft Azure M176ds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It features 176 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 2794.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 15.88 GB per vCPU.

For local storage requirements, the server includes a 410 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There is no integrated GPU hardware on this instance.

Given the massive memory footprint and high count of dedicated vCPUs, this server represents a high-density resource profile designed for enterprise-scale workloads. It is qualitatively positioned for memory-intensive applications such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing operations where massive datasets must reside entirely in RAM to avoid disk latency.
description: Microsoft Azure M176ds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, featuring 176 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs on an Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. The server is configured with 2794.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory allocation of 15.88 GB per vCPU. It includes 410 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance external disk configurations. This instance does not feature a GPU or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Engineered for massive resource density, the M176ds_3_v3 is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale in-memory databases, data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning systems requiring substantial memory capacity and dedicated compute resources.
